capability_window.capability_slice: Convert skill and route evidence into bounded local lanes that can be validated before activation.

items.name: bionemo-agent-toolkit
items.title: BioNeMo Agent Toolkit public agent skill catalog
items.summary: Public repository presenting ready-to-call agent skills, skill catalog metadata, agent plugin marketplace files, workflow directories, and a skills.sh.json catalog. The evidence is useful for local skill route discovery only and does not authorize install or execution.

items.name: zhengxi-views
items.title: Source-cited public Agent Skill route evidence
items.summary: Public Agent Skill repository with traceable source citations, SKILL.md style workflow metadata, skill manifest hints, validation scripts, references, evals, and non-investment-advice boundaries. The evidence should map only to bounded local validation lanes.

items.name: Qwen-AgentWorld
items.title: General agent project without skill workflow route signal
items.summary: General-agent language world model and evaluation project. The digest evidence lacks skill package layout, skill workflow route hints, or local harness validation.

items.name: Fundamental-Ava
items.title: General autonomous social agent project without skill workflow route signal
items.summary: General autonomous, collaborative, and socially intelligent agent project. The digest evidence lacks skill package layout, skill workflow route hints, or local harness validation.
